title: saussurea riederi subsp. yezoensis
intro: Saussurea riederi subsp. yezoensis, a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, is commonly known as Yezo saussurea or Yezo yarrow. It is a medicinal plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. The plant is known for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory and digestive issues. Saussurea riederi subsp. yezoensis is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including colds, flu, and digestive problems.
